name: part_006
file: tmp_【チラ見せ】hololive 3rd Generation Live#きゅるるん大作戦〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜【DAY2】 [XJJXk28ivwY]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_006.webm

scenes.description: The live concert begins with high-energy shots of the audience and elaborate stage lighting effects.
An introduction video plays on the big screens, featuring each member of hololive's 3rd Generation: Usada Pekora, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel, and Houshou Marine.
The members appear on stage and perform their group song, 'Kyururun Daisakusen'.

subtitles.original: こんぺこ！
subtitles.english: Konpeko!

subtitles.original:
不知火フレア

subtitles.original: こんまっする！

(SHIROGANE NOEL)

#きゅるるん大作戦

#Kyururun Daisakusen
~The Strongest Idols, You Can't Help But Stan~

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 3rdのガールは 欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idols, we 3rd Gen girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 4人なのにお家みたいで
subtitles.english: The four of us feel just like home

subtitles.original: だるだるなテンション
subtitles.english: Lazy, relaxed vibes

subtitles.original: くるるん大作戦

subtitles.original: 喜怒哀楽はシェアしてさ

subtitles.original: 大きくなっていきたいよね でも小さなことも大事にして
subtitles.english: We want to grow big, but we'll treasure the small things too

subtitles.original: 一つ一つ刻んでく
subtitles.english: Carving out each and every moment

subtitles.original: 楽しんでくれるのが嬉しい
subtitles.english: It makes us happy when you enjoy it

subtitles.original: 最高のエンターテイナー
subtitles.english: As the ultimate entertainers

subtitles.original: 後ろまで見えてるよ
subtitles.english: We can see all the way to the back

subtitles.original: 画面の向こうも届いてる
subtitles.english: And we're reaching those beyond the screen

subtitles.original: 光の海を泳ごう
subtitles.english: Let's swim through this sea of light

subtitles.original: 超アイドル 3rdのガールは 欲張り
subtitles.english: Super idols, we 3rd Gen girls are greedy

subtitles.original: 愛されたいし 夢乗せたいし 君とじゃなきゃやだ

subtitles.original: 絶好調です 狙い撃ちで 君にウインク

subtitles.original: やっぱ3rdのガールで めっちゃハッピー

subtitles.original: お嫁したいし 声出したいし 叶っちゃうやだ
subtitles.english: Want to be brides, want to shout, oh it's coming true!

subtitles.original: 全力走る 勿論君と

subtitles.original: 笑い合ってもっと可愛くなる
subtitles.english: We'll get even cuter as we laugh together

subtitles.original: Oh yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Oh yeah yeah

subtitles.original: せっかくだからやり切りたいし 乗り越えるべき壁もデカい

subtitles.original: そうさうんとエンタメて

subtitles.original: 君が思ってるよりずっと 君のことを想ってる
subtitles.english: Way more than you think, we're thinking about you

subtitles.original: どうかな 焦がれた 夢には近づけてるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder, are we getting closer to the dreams we longed for?

subtitles.original:
みんなの声があるから頑張れるんだ 聞かせて

We can do our best because we have your voices. Let us hear it!
One, two, three, four!

subtitles.english: Super awesome, we 3rd Gen girls are happy

subtitles.english: Having a place to go where we're loved, looking down is a no-no

subtitles.original: テンポアップし 続けていくよ

subtitles.original: 見たい景色へ
subtitles.english: To the scenery we want to see

subtitles.english: Show it to the world! L-O-V-E

subtitles.original: 光呼び出せ! L-O-V-E
subtitles.english: Call out the light! L-O-V-E

subtitles.original: 今すぐ足せ! L-O-V-E

subtitles.original: みんなで作ってく! Yeah!
subtitles.english: Creating it together with everyone! Yeah!

subtitles.original: もっともっと盛り上がっていくぞー！
subtitles.english: Let's get even more hyped up!

subtitles.original: 君たち、まだまだ声出せますよねー！
subtitles.english: You guys, you can still let your voices out, right?!
